title: JAMMER CRITICAL FAILURE!
description: KHOKAAR's specialized signal jammer, vital for bypassing the laser grid protecting the vault entrance, has suddenly powered down. The display shows a critical system error, leaving the laser grid fully active and blocking your path, with two guards still patrolling nearby.
hint: how to diagnose or manually override the jammer, or an immediate alternative method to bypass the active laser grid, considering the nearby guards.
fail_consequence: The laser grid will trip, immediately alerting the two nearby guards and triggering a direct, unavoidable confrontation.
